query: SELECT expenseType, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(amount) as total FROM expenses WHERE deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY expenseType
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT expenseType, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(amount) as total FROM expenses WHERE deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY expenseType
